title: TiO₂
caption: FIG. 7. The measured (circles) and calculated (line) thickness profiles of a 1000cycle deposition process of TiO2 from TiCl4 and H2O. The nominal channel gap height is 0.5 l m. The length L of the channel was 1 mm which gives a structural aspect ratio of 2000.
